title: Valentine's Day Idea | Photo Canvases + Mixbook discount code
excerpt: Last summer we had Christian + Reinna take our photos at our favorite LA beach and I love how they turned out! Not only do they capture my little family so well but the colors in each image fit my…
body:
Last summer we had Christian + Reinna take our photos at our favorite LA beach and I love how they turned out! Not only do they capture my little family so well but the colors in each image fit my home decor perfectly. Thanks to Mixbook, I was able to create three beautiful canvases in a matter of minutes and will be gifting them to JC for Valentine's Day. Once they arrived, I couldn't wait to get them on my walls, which sort of spoils the surprise element, but is great because we get to enjoy them a little early!

Since JC and I are constantly restyling our home, I decided to use Velcro Hangables. Following the instructions on the packing, I simply attached the strips to the back of each 8x10 canvas and hung them on the wall!
